title: Rain resistant paper sack
abstract: The present disclosure provides a multi-ply sack (100) comprising an inner paper ply (101), an outer paper ply (102) and plastic film arranged between the inner paper ply (101) and the outer paper ply (102), wherein the outer paper ply (102) is sized with at least one hydrophobic size, the Gurley porosity according to ISO 5636-5 of the inner paper ply (101) is less than 10s, the plastic film provides an substantially uninterrupted barrier between the inner paper ply (101) and the outer paper ply (102) and the sack (100) is configured to allow air to escape from an interspace between the inner paper ply (101) and the plastic film through a top end (111) of the sack (100) during filling of the sack (100).
claims:
Claims 1. A multi-ply sack comprising an inner paper ply, an outer paper ply and plastic film arranged between the inner paper ply and the outer paper ply, wherein the outer paper ply is sized with at least one hydrophobic size, the Gurley porosity according to ISO 5636-5 of the inner paper ply is less than 10 s, the plastic film provides an substantially uninterrupted barrier for liquid water, moisture and air between the inner paper ply and the outer paper ply and the sack is configured to allow air to escape from an interspace between the inner paper ply and the plastic film through a top end of the sack during filling of the sack. 2. The multi-ply sack according to claim 1, wherein the outer paper ply is a bleached paper ply. 3. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the sack is a valve sack. 4. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one hydrophobic size comprises AKD and rosin size. 5. The multi-ply sack according to claim 2, wherein the outer paper ply has been sized with AKD and rosin size in a weight ratio between 1:6 and 1:1.5, such as between 1:5 and 1:2. 6. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the total amount of hydrophobic size used for sizing the outer paper ply is 1.5-4 kg/ton paper, such as 2.0-3.5 kg/ton paper. 7. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the static friction coefficient according to Tappi T-815 of the outside of the outer paper ply is at least 0.5, such as at least 0.53. 8. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the Cobb 1800 s value measured according to ISO 535 of the outside 

 of the outer paper ply is less than 60 g/m 2 , such as less than 50 g/m 2 , such as less than 45 g/m 2 , such as less than 40 g/m 2 . 9. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the outer paper ply comprises a wet-strength agent, such as urea- formaldehyde (UF) or melamine-formaldehyde (MF). 10. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the outer paper ply is a Kraft paper ply. 11. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the grammage according to ISO 536 of the outer paper ply is 50-140 g/m 2 , such as 55-100 g/m 2 , such as 60-90 g/m 2 . 12. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the Gurley porosity according to ISO 5636-5 of the inner paper ply is less than 8 s, such as less than 7 s, such as less than 6 s. 13. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the grammage according to ISO 536 of the inner ply is 50-140 g/m 2 , such as 55-100 g/m 2 , such as 60-90 g/m 2 . 14. The multi-ply sack according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the tensile energy absorption according to ISO 1924-3 of the inner ply is at least 196 J/m 2 in the machine direction and at least 203 J/m 2 in the cross direction. 15. A bleached Kraft paper for use in a sack, wherein: the grammage according to ISO 536 of said paper is 55-100 g/m 2 , such as 60- 90 g/m 2 ; the brightness according to ISO 2470-1 of said paper is at least 78 %, such as at least 83 %; said paper comprises a urea formaldehyde wet strength agent; said paper has been sized with AKD and rosin size in a weight ratio between 1:5 and 1:2; the amount of hydrophobic size used for sizing the paper is 1.5-4 kg/ton 

 paper, such as 2.0-3.5 kg/ton paper; the Gurley porosity according to ISO 5636-5 of said paper is at least 18 s, such as at least 22 s; the static friction coefficient of at least one side, such as both sides, of said paper is at least 0.5 and the Cobb 1800 s value measured according to ISO 535 of at least one side of said paper is less than 50 g/m 2 , such as less than 45 g/m 2 , such as less than 40 g/m 2 . 16. A sack comprising a ply composed of the bleached Kraft paper of claim 15.
